title: SSA 404 fallthrough comment is misleading
description: lib.rs:208-210: '// Should not happen with SSA, but handle defensively'. SSA Patch::Apply to a non-existent resource CREATES it — Kubernetes SSA is a create-or-update operation. A 404 from SSA would mean the API endpoint itself is unavailable, not that the resource is missing. The comment should say: '// 404 here means the API group is unavailable, not the resource; fall through and attempt explicit create.' Or the dead code branch should be removed entirely since SSA guarantees create-or-update.
